import json


def walk_json(data, max_depth: int = 50, _depth: int = 0) -> list:
    if _depth >= max_depth:
        return [data]
    results = []
    if isinstance(data, dict):
        for k, v in data.items():
            results.append(k)
            results.extend(walk_json(v, max_depth, _depth + 1))
    elif isinstance(data, list):
        for item in data:
            results.extend(walk_json(item, max_depth, _depth + 1))
    else:
        results.append(data)
    return results


def validate_structure(data: dict, max_depth: int = 20, _depth: int = 0) -> bool:
    if _depth >= max_depth:
        return False
    if not isinstance(data, dict):
        return False
    for key, value in data.items():
        if isinstance(value, dict):
            if not validate_structure(value, max_depth, _depth + 1):
                return False
        elif isinstance(value, list):
            for item in value:
                if isinstance(item, dict):
                    if not validate_structure(item, max_depth, _depth + 1):
                        return False
    return True
